# Step 03 — PR Detail (Approver View)

**Persona:** Approver (HOD / FC / GM / Owner)
**Module:** 3
**Section:** 3.3
**Route:** `/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid`
**Parent Flow:** Approver — Review & Approve PR
**Last Updated:** 2026-04-22 — Added Bulk Reject dialog spec table to §On Bulk Reject

---

## 1. Access Path

From **My Approval** (step-01): click any PR number → PR Detail
From **PR List** (step-02): click any PR Ref → PR Detail

---

## 2. Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    myapproval["1. My Approval Dashboard"] --> list["2. PR List"]
    list --> detail["3. PR Detail"]
    detail --> edit["4. Edit Mode - Approved Qty"]
    edit -->|Approve| approved(["PR Approved"])
    edit -->|Reject| rejected(["PR Rejected"])
    edit -->|Send for Review| review(["PR Returned"])
    style detail fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 3. Screen Layout

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ CARMEN  Procurement › Purchase Request                    [Edit ✎]  [💬]     │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  ◄ PR20260400002  [IN PROGRESS]                                               │
│  Date: 2026-04-07    Objective: dffn (HOD) วัลภา    Department: Guest Service │
│                                                       and Bell Staff          │
│  Workflow: ●—●—●—…                                                            │
│  Description: (empty)                                                        │
│                                                                               │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐     │
│  │ [Items]  [Workflow History]                                          │     │
│  │                                                                     │     │
│  │  # Loc  Product          Req  Approved  FOC  Amount  Currency  Del.Pt│     │
│  │  1  …   Mango Sour Sour… 4    —         4    0.00    THB       Main  │     │
│  │  2  …   Honey on the 5th 2    2         —    0.00    THB       Main  │     │
│  │  3  …   ATTN: Wheat Rsg… 3    —         —    0.00    THB       Main  │     │
│  │                                                                     │     │
│  │  Subtotal: 0.00  Discount: 0.00  Tax: 0.00  Total: 0.00            │     │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘     │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 4. Header Fields

| Field | Edit Permission | Description | Remark |
|-------|-----------------|-------------|--------|
| PR Reference | View Only | PR number (PR-YYYYMM-NNNN) | Displayed large with back arrow |
| Status | View Only | Current status badge | Orange = IN PROGRESS |
| Date | View Only | PR creation date | YYYY-MM-DD |
| Objective / Requestor | View Only | Requestor name + role description | Labelled "Objective" in UI |
| Department | View Only | Department that created the PR | FR-PR-010 requires "Department" label |
| Workflow Stepper | View Only | Visual stages with current stage highlighted | Dots/circles indicating stage progression |
| Description | View Only | PR description/purpose text | May be empty |

---

## 5. Items Tab — Columns

| Column | Edit Permission | Description | Remark |
|--------|-----------------|-------------|--------|
| # | View Only | Line item number | Sequential |
| Location | View Only | Store/kitchen location | FR-PR-011A: visible to Approver |
| Product | View Only | Item name + product code | Multi-line cell |
| Requested | View Only | Requested quantity | BRD field: Request Quantity |
| Approved | View Only | Approved quantity (set by approver in edit mode) | Shows "—" if not yet set; Approver can edit in Edit Mode only |
| FOC | View Only | Free of Charge quantity | Visible to Approver per FR-PR-024 |
| Amount | View Only | Calculated line total | Subtotal × price minus discount |
| Currency | View Only | Currency code | THB by default |
| Delivery Point | View Only | Delivery destination | Per-line field |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** BRD FR-PR-011A lists Vendor, Unit Price, Discount Rate, Tax Profile as visible (read-only) to Approver. In the live UI Items tab, these columns are NOT visible in the collapsed default view. They may appear only after the approver enters Edit Mode. Impact: Approvers reviewing PRs in read-only mode cannot see vendor/pricing without entering Edit Mode — contradicts BRD's intent that "Approvers always see vendor and pricing information in read-only mode."

---

## 6. Financial Summary (Items Tab Footer)

| Field | Edit Permission | Description | Remark |
|-------|-----------------|-------------|--------|
| Subtotal | View Only | Sum of all line item subtotals | |
| Discount | View Only | Total discount applied | |
| Tax | View Only | Total tax | |
| Total | View Only | Grand total (Subtotal − Discount + Tax) | |

---

## 7. Workflow History Tab

The Workflow History tab shows the approval timeline as a vertical timeline of events.

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Stage node (green) | Completed stage with timestamp, actor, and comment |
| Stage node (orange) | Current/pending stage — shows "Pending" and actor name |
| Stage node (grey) | Future stage not yet reached |

**Observed timeline for PR20260400002:**
1. Submitted — dffn (HOD) วัลภา, 2026-04-07 09:16
2. Create Request → HOD (pending) — dffn (HOD) วัลภา, 2026-04-17 09:16

---

## 8. Action Buttons

| Button | Icon | Color | Type | Enabled When | Behaviour |
|--------|------|-------|------|--------------|-----------|
| Edit | Pencil (✎) | Neutral | Icon button | Status = IN PROGRESS | Enters Edit Mode (step-04) |
| Comment | Message-square (💬) | Neutral | Icon button | Always | Opens comment dialog |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy — PR-level vs item-level action buttons:** BRD FR-PR-005A specifies **PR-level** Reject/Return/Approve buttons directly on the PR Detail page. The live UI does **not** have PR-level action buttons. Instead, Approve/Reject/Return are implemented as **item-level bulk actions** accessible only in Edit Mode after selecting item checkboxes (see step-04 §13). The live UI workflow is: Enter Edit Mode → select items via checkboxes → choose Approve / Send for Review / Reject per item. This is a design-level divergence from the BRD single-button PR approval model.

---

## 9. Button Visibility State Matrix

| PR Status | Edit Button | Comment Button | Approve Button | Reject Button | Return Button |
|-----------|-------------|----------------|----------------|---------------|---------------|
| DRAFT | ❌ Hidden | ❌ Hidden | ❌ Hidden | ❌ Hidden | ❌ Hidden |
| IN PROGRESS (at HOD stage) | ✅ Shown | ✅ Shown | ❌ Not present | ❌ Not present | ❌ Not present |
| IN PROGRESS (past HOD stage) | ❌ Hidden | ✅ Shown | ❌ Not present | ❌ Not present | ❌ Not present |
| APPROVED | ❌ Hidden | ✅ Shown | ❌ Not present | ❌ Not present | ❌ Not present |
| VOID | ❌ Hidden | ✅ Shown | ❌ Not present | ❌ Not present | ❌ Not present |

*"Not present" = button does not exist in live UI (vs "Hidden" = button exists but is disabled/hidden)*

---

## 10. Business Rules

| # | Rule | FR Reference |
|---|------|-------------|
| BR-01 | Approver sees PR in read-only by default; Edit Mode required to adjust quantities | FR-PR-011 |
| BR-02 | Approved Qty is editable only in Edit Mode | FR-PR-011A |
| BR-03 | Approver sees FOC quantity field (not visible to Requestor); server-side API enforces access control — unauthorized FOC writes return 403 | FR-PR-018, FR-PR-024 |
| BR-04 | Approver always sees vendor/pricing info in read-only (per BRD; not confirmed in UI) | FR-PR-011A |
| BR-05 | Workflow History shows full approval timeline | FR-PR-005 |
| BR-06 | Approver cannot approve their own PR | BR-PR-015 |
| BR-07 | Comment button available regardless of PR status | FR-PR-008 |
| BR-08 | PR detail visible to all approver roles (HOD sees own dept; FC/GM/Owner see all) | FR-PR-009 |

---

## 11. Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| Approver opens PR from another department (HOD) | 403 forbidden or redirect to My Approval |
| Approved Qty not yet set for an item | Shows "—" in Approved column |
| PR has 0 items | Items tab shows empty state; Total = 0.00 |
| Requestor set hide_price = true | Approver still sees full pricing per FR-PR-011A note |
| PR is in APPROVED status | Edit button hidden; Comment still available |
| Multiple HOD approvers in same department | First to act processes the PR; second sees it as already actioned |
| Workflow History tab has no entries | Empty timeline (should not occur for IN PROGRESS PRs) |

---

## 12. Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|------------|
| Click Edit (✎) button | step-04 Edit Mode |
| Click Comment (💬) button | Comment dialog (inline) |
| Click back arrow / breadcrumb | step-02 PR List |
| Click Items tab | Items tab (default) |
| Click Workflow History tab | Workflow History tab |

---

## 13. API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid` | Fetch PR detail |
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid/workflow-history` | Fetch approval timeline |
| POST | `/api/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid/comment` | Add comment |

---

---

## 14. Validation on Bulk Actions

Applies when Approver uses the bulk item action toolbar (triggered via "Select Items" modal dialog on the Items tab, in both read-only and Edit Mode).

### On Bulk Approve

**Purpose / Use Case:** Approve all selected line items and advance the PR toward completion — use when items are confirmed ready for procurement.

| # | Check | BR | Pass Behaviour | Fail Behaviour |
|---|-------|----|----------------|----------------|
| 1 | At least one item checkbox selected via Select All dropdown | FR-PR-026 | Approve button enabled | Approve button disabled |
| 2 | Items are in an approvable status (not already APPROVED/VOID) | FR-PR-006 | Items status → APPROVED; PR advances if all items approved | Items excluded from action or warning shown (TBC) |
| 3 | Approver has authority to approve at current workflow stage | FR-PR-005A | Approval recorded; email notification triggered | Action blocked (not applicable if no PRs at stage) |

> ✅ **Confirmed (2026-04-21):** Bulk Approve applies **immediately with no confirmation dialog**. Items change to APPROVED status (shown with a dismissable × badge). A PR-level "Approve" button appears at the bottom of the page after items are approved. Individual approvals can be reverted within the edit session by clicking the × on the APPROVED badge.

![Bulk Approve applied — items show APPROVED × badge, PR-level Approve button at bottom](data:image/png;base64,)

### On Bulk Reject

**Purpose / Use Case:** Permanently reject selected line items when the request cannot be fulfilled or justified — triggers a reason dialog so the requester understands why.

| # | Check | BR | Pass Behaviour | Fail Behaviour |
|---|-------|----|----------------|----------------|
| 1 | At least one item checkbox selected | FR-PR-026 | Reject button enabled | Reject button disabled |
| 2 | Rejection reason entered (optional per item) | FR-PR-005A | Save enabled immediately; items → REJECTED; reason recorded if entered | No minimum — field is optional, Save button is always enabled |
| 3 | Items not already in terminal status (APPROVED/VOID) | FR-PR-006 | Rejection applied | Items excluded (TBC) |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (Reject dialog):** BRD FR-PR-005A requires a minimum 10-character rejection comment. Live UI shows the reason field as **optional** — no minimum length enforced. Save button is enabled regardless. Impact: rejection reasons may be omitted, reducing audit trail quality.
>
> ✅ **Confirmed (2026-04-21):** Bulk Reject shows a dialog titled **"Reject Selected Items"** with a per-item text field for a rejection reason. Buttons: **Cancel** (dismisses dialog) and **Reject** (applies). Applies immediately once Reject is clicked.

**Reject Selected Items dialog (confirmed):**

| Element | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Title | **Reject Selected Items** |
| Body | Per-item text field for rejection reason (one field per selected item) |
| **Reject** | Red/destructive button — applies immediately; selected items → REJECTED status |
| **Cancel** | Outline/Grey button — dismisses dialog, no changes applied |

![Bulk Reject dialog — "Reject Selected Items" with per-item optional reason fields](data:image/png;base64,)

### On Bulk Send for Review (BRD: "Return Selected")

**Purpose / Use Case:** Return selected items to an earlier stage for correction or additional information — use when items need rework before approval can proceed.

| # | Check | BR | Pass Behaviour | Fail Behaviour |
|---|-------|----|----------------|----------------|
| 1 | At least one item checkbox selected | FR-PR-026 | Send for Review button enabled | Button disabled |
| 2 | Items not already in terminal status | FR-PR-006 | Action applied immediately (no dialog) | Items excluded (TBC) |

> ✅ **Confirmed (2026-04-21):** Bulk "Send for Review" applies **immediately with no confirmation dialog** — no comment required. Items change to REVIEW status and a "Send Back" button appears below the grid.

![After Bulk Send for Review — items in REVIEW status, Send Back button visible](data:image/png;base64,)
>
> ⚠️ **Label discrepancy:** BRD FR-PR-026 and FR-PR-005A call this action "Return Selected". Live UI button label is **"Send for Review"**. Functionally equivalent.
>
> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (Send for Review):** BRD FR-PR-005A specifies a mandatory return comment (min 10 characters). Live UI applies the action immediately with no comment prompt. Impact: no reason is captured for the return, reducing audit trail quality.

### On Bulk Split

**Purpose / Use Case:** Move selected items into a new separate PR — use when different items need to be handled at different times, by different vendors, or under separate budgets.

| # | Check | BR | Pass Behaviour | Fail Behaviour |
|---|-------|----|----------------|----------------|
| 1 | Minimum 2 items selected | FR-PR-026 | Split button enabled; new PR created with selected items | Split button disabled if < 2 items selected |
| 2 | At least one item must remain in the original PR after split | Backend validation | Split proceeds (or would if `pr_date` bug fixed) | Toast warning (top-right): "Cannot split all details. At least one detail must remain in the original PR." — cannot split all items out; at least one must remain in the original PR |
| 3 | `pr_date` must be valid DateTime or Null | Backend validation | Split proceeds, new PR created | HTTP 400: "Argument `pr_date`: Invalid value provided. Expected DateTime or Null, provided Object." — **CURRENT BUG** |
| 4 | PR is in an active workflow stage | FR-PR-005A | New PR inherits header fields; original PR retains remaining items | Split blocked for APPROVED/COMPLETED/VOID PRs |

> 🐛 **Bug (2026-04-21, re-tested 2026-04-21):** Split is blocked by a backend 400 error for partial-item selection. Additionally, selecting all items triggers a business-rule validation (toast warning — not a bug). Details:
>
> **Case A — Partial selection (subset of items, at least one left behind):**
> `POST /api/proxy/api/T02/purchase-request/{uuid}/split` → HTTP 400
> Response: `"Argument \`pr_date\`: Invalid value provided. Expected DateTime or Null, provided Object."`
> Payload sent: `{"detail_ids": ["<uuid1>", "<uuid2>"]}` — no `pr_date` field. Server expects a `pr_date` field in the split payload; the client is not sending it (or sending an Object instead of a DateTime string). This is the original reported bug and **is still present**.
>
> **Case B — All items selected (nothing left in original PR):**
> `POST /api/proxy/api/T02/purchase-request/{uuid}/split` → HTTP 400
> Response: `"Cannot split all details. At least one detail must remain in the original PR"`
> **This is confirmed expected validation** — not a bug. The UI displays this as a toast warning (top-right): **"Cannot split all details. At least one detail must remain in the original PR."** The user must deselect at least one item so that at least one remains in the original PR.
>
> The Split dialog UI has never been observed. No frontend confirmation dialog appears in either case — the API call fires immediately on Split click. The Split dialog (if any) and its fields remain unconfirmed. Documentation below is based on BRD FR-PR-026 only.

---

## 15. Bulk Item Actions (FR-PR-026)

BRD FR-PR-026 specifies a bulk action toolbar on the Items tab, available to both Approvers and Purchasing Staff.

### BRD-Specified Actions (Approver)

| Action | Minimum Selection | Comment Required | Description |
|--------|------------------|------------------|-------------|
| Approve Selected | 1 item | No | Sets item status to Approved; copies Requested Qty → Approved Qty |
| Reject Selected | 1 item | Yes (min 10 chars) | Sets item status to Rejected |
| Return Selected | 1 item | Yes (min 10 chars) | Returns item to requestor for revision |
| **Split** | **2 items** | No | Creates new PR with selected items; enables parallel processing |
| Set Date Required | 1 item | No | Updates delivery date for selected items |

### Split PR — Approver Workflow (FR-PR-026)

Split enables an approver to partially approve a PR when some items are ready to proceed but others need revision:

1. Approver selects items needing review (checked checkboxes)
2. Clicks **Split** in the bulk action toolbar
3. Chooses split type: By Approval Status / By Vendor / By Delivery Date / Manual
4. System creates a new PR with the split items (status: Returned → requestor)
5. Original PR retains remaining items (status: Approved → proceeds to PO)
6. Both PRs linked via `parent_pr_id` for audit trail
7. Requestor is notified of the split with reason per returned item

### Role-Based Action Availability (FR-PR-026)

| Action | Requestor | Approver | Purchasing Staff |
|--------|-----------|----------|------------------|
| Select Items | ✅ (Draft/Void/Returned) | ✅ | ✅ |
| Approve Selected | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Reject Selected | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Return Selected | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Split | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Set Date Required | ✅ (Draft/Void/Returned) | ✅ | ✅ |

### How to Trigger the Bulk Toolbar

The item grid contains a compound "Select All" control (`<button role="checkbox" aria-label="Select all">`). Clicking it opens a **modal dialog** — not a native checkbox or dropdown. This is the correct mechanism to activate the bulk toolbar.

1. Click the **"Select all" button** (top-left of items grid)
2. A **modal dialog titled "Select Items"** appears with:
   - **Select All Purchase Request Items (N Items)** — selects all rows regardless of status
   - **Select Only Status Pending (N Items)** — selects only items in internal PENDING status
   - Cancel
3. Choose an option; the bulk action toolbar appears **above the items grid** (Approve / Send for Review / Reject / Split)
4. Works in both **read-only mode** and **Edit Mode**

![Select Items modal dialog](data:image/png;base64,)

> ⚠️ **Note (2026-04-21):** "Select Only Status Pending" reports 0 items for all HOD-stage test PRs in ZB01 — items that have previously been acted upon (Send for Review, Approve, etc.) are not counted as "Status Pending" for this filter, even if their visible badge shows PENDING. Use "Select All Purchase Request Items" to select all rows.

> ✅ **Confirmed (2026-04-21):** FR-PR-026 bulk item actions are implemented for the Approver role. The bulk action toolbar appears when one or more item checkboxes are selected via the "Select Items" modal — in **both read-only and Edit Mode**.
>
> **Live buttons confirmed (HOD, 1 checkbox selected). FC/GM/Owner: expected identical behaviour per same shared UI — not directly verified (no PRs at those stages in ZB01 test data).**
>
> | Button | Colour | BRD Name | Status |
> |--------|--------|----------|--------|
> | Approve | Green | Approve Selected | ✅ Present |
> | Send for Review | Outline/Gray | Return Selected | ✅ Present — **label differs from BRD** |
> | Reject | Red | Reject Selected | ✅ Present |
> | Split | Outline | Split | ✅ Present |
> | Set Date Required | Blue | Set Date Required | ❌ Not present |
>
> ⚠️ **Label discrepancy:** BRD calls it "Return Selected"; live UI shows **"Send for Review"**.
> ⚠️ **Missing action:** "Set Date Required" (BRD FR-PR-026) is not in the live toolbar.

> ⚠️ **Documentation Gap (FR-PR-026):** Three items from BRD FR-PR-026 remain undocumented or unconfirmed: (a) the **Split dialog UI** has never been observed — one backend bug (`pr_date`) blocks partial selection (see §14 On Bulk Split bug note): the `pr_date` bug blocks partial selection (no toast — silent failure and remains unresolved); selecting all items correctly triggers a toast warning ("Cannot split all details. At least one detail must remain in the original PR.") — **this is confirmed working validation, not a bug**. The Split API fires immediately on click (no frontend confirmation dialog observed). Dialog fields, validation, and confirmation flow remain BRD-spec only; (b) **Return Selected** ("Send for Review") has no confirmed dialog — BRD specifies a comment field and stage selector, neither verified in live UI; (c) **Set Date Required** action is absent from the live toolbar entirely. Priority: High.

![Bulk action toolbar — Approve / Send for Review / Reject / Split](data:image/png;base64,)


---

## 16. Tabs Overview

The PR Detail page has **two visible tabs** for the Approver:

| Tab | Default | Description |
|-----|---------|-------------|
| Items | Yes | Line items grid with quantities, FOC, amounts |
| Workflow History | No | Approval timeline |

> Budget Tab (FR-PR-027): BRD specifies a Budget tab visible to all roles (Approver: view-only). The tab was **not observed** in the live UI for any approver role (HOD confirmed absent; FC/GM/Owner not directly tested). It may be hidden for the Approver role or pending implementation.

### Items Tab — Expand All

An **Expand all** button is visible at the top-right of the Items section. Clicking it expands each line item to show the full per-item detail card (vendor, pricing breakdown, currency, delivery info). Collapsed by default.

| Control | Location | Behaviour |
|---------|----------|-----------|
| Expand all | Top-right of Items tab | Expands all line item detail cards |
| Collapse | Per row | Collapses individual item card |

---

## 17. Multi-Currency Display (FR-PR-029)

When a PR contains items in a currency different from the base currency, the Approver sees dual-amount display (read-only):

| Element | Transaction Currency | Base Currency (converted) |
|---------|---------------------|--------------------------|
| Unit Price | Primary — gray-900, text-sm | Green-700, text-xs, below |
| Subtotal | Primary | Green secondary |
| Discount | Primary | Green secondary |
| Net Amount | Primary | Green secondary |
| Tax | Primary | Green secondary |
| **Total** | **Primary (bold)** | Green secondary |

**Visual badges shown:**
- "Base Currency" badge — indicates reporting currency
- "Rate: 1 XXX = Y ZZZ" badge — current exchange rate

Approver cannot change currency or override exchange rate (read-only). Only Purchasing Staff can edit these in Edit Mode.

Conversion formula: convertedAmount = originalAmount multiplied by exchangeRate

### TBC — Dual Display Verification

The following scenarios require confirmation in a PR that has non-base currency and/or non-base order units:

| Scenario | Expected Behaviour | Verified? |
|----------|--------------------|-----------|
| Document currency differs from base currency (e.g. USD PR, THB base) | All monetary fields show transaction amount (primary) + base currency amount (green, smaller font) | TBC — test data uses THB matching base |
| All items in base currency | Single currency display only — no green secondary amounts shown | TBC |
| Item order unit differs from base inventory unit (e.g. ordered in BOX, base = KG) | FR-PR-003/FR-PR-028: price normalised to base unit for comparison. Check whether item grid shows order unit quantity AND base unit equivalent side-by-side | TBC — not confirmed in live UI |
| Mixed PR: some items foreign currency, some base currency | Per-item dual display for foreign items; single display for base-currency items | TBC |

> **Recommended test:** Use Purchasing Staff login (purchase@zebra.com), find or create a PR with a non-THB line item, then review as each approver role in sequence (hod@zebra.com, fc@zebra.com, gm@zebra.com, owner@zebra.com) to confirm dual display renders correctly at each approval stage.

> ⚠️ **Documentation Gap (FR-PR-003):** Exchange rate display and unit conversion are documented above, but BRD FR-PR-003 specifies additional detail not yet captured: rounding rules (per-unit vs. total rounding, decimal precision), the exact exchange rate source (daily rate feed vs. manual override), and the formula for back-calculation from total to unit price when tax is inclusive. Priority: High.

---

## 18. Comments & Attachments (FR-PR-008 + FR-PR-007)

Attachments are integrated into the comment flow — there is **no separate Attachments section**. Both are accessed via the **Comment** button.

> **Discrepancy:** BRD FR-PR-007 describes a standalone "Document Attachments Section" in PR Detail with file list, preview, and download. The live UI integrates attachments into the comment dialog. This is a design deviation from the BRD specification.

### Comment Dialog

| Field | Description | Constraint |
|-------|-------------|-----------|
| Comment text | Free-text comment body | Min 10 chars for Reject/Return (per BRD); optional for general comments |
| Attachment | File upload within comment | Integrated per FR-PR-007 + FR-PR-008 merge |

### Comment Thread Display (FR-PR-008 — status pending)

Per FR-PR-008, comments should display as a thread with:
- Author name, role, avatar
- Timestamp (relative: "2 hours ago")
- Edit/delete own comment within 15 min
- Thread replies indented

> **Discrepancy:** Comment thread display per FR-PR-008 is marked pending. Whether the current Comment dialog shows a thread or just an input is TBC — not captured in screenshots.

---

## 19. Price Visibility Rules (FR-PR-019)

The Requestor may set a hide_price flag on a PR. This flag has **no effect** on the Approver view:

**Rule (FR-PR-011A):** Approvers always see vendor and pricing information in read-only mode, regardless of the requestor's hide_price setting.

| hide_price value | Requestor view | Approver view |
|-----------------|----------------|---------------|
| false (default) | Prices visible | Prices visible |
| true | Prices hidden | **Prices still visible** |

---

## 20. Email Notifications to Approver (FR-PR-014)

| Event | Trigger | Recipient | SLA |
|-------|---------|-----------|-----|
| PR Submitted | Requestor submits PR | Designated approver(s) | Within 5 min |
| PR Requires Action | Daily digest | Pending approvers | 8:00 AM daily |
| PR Deadline Approaching | Delivery date within 3 days, not yet approved | Approver | System-scheduled |

**Approval delegation (FR-PR-005):** Approver can redirect notifications to a delegate when away. Delegated notifications route to the delegate; delegate can action the PR on behalf of the approver.

> **Discrepancy:** FR-PR-014 is marked pending. Email notifications and delegation were not verified in the live UI. Treat as planned functionality.


-
---

## 21. Inventory Data in Items Tab (FR-PR-017)

### Business Purpose

On-Hand and On-Order data is shown in the **expanded item card** to support procurement decisions:

| Field | Business Question for Approver |
|-------|-------------------------------|
| **On Hand** | Is there already enough stock at this location? Does approving make sense? |
| **On Order** | Is this item already on an active PO? Would approving create a duplicate? |
| **Re-order Pt.** | At what stock level should reordering be triggered? |
| **Re-stock** | What quantity is needed to restore to par level? |
| **Stock Level %** | What percentage of target stock is currently held? |

### How to Access

1. In the Items tab, click **Collapse all → Expand all** (or expand individual rows)
2. Each expanded item shows a **Vendor / Pricing** section followed by an **Inventory Information** panel

> ⚠️ **Visibility note:** The Inventory Information sub-panel sits at the **bottom of the expanded item card**, below vendor/pricing rows. It has a collapsible ^ chevron labelled "Inventory Information". Re-stock and Stock Level % may be clipped by panel height — scroll within the item card to see all fields.

> ⚠️ **Missing — Pricelist / Vendor Comparison Lookup (FR-PR-028):** The Purchaser's edit mode has a **"Pricelist" icon button** (`aria-label="Pricelist"`) next to each item's vendor row. Clicking it opens a **"Price List Comparison"** modal (columns: Vendor | Pricelist No | Unit | Price | Currency | Effective). This icon is **absent from the Approver view** — neither in read-only mode nor in Edit Mode. BRD FR-PR-028 specifies a read-only price comparison table for Approvers. Not implemented (see §24).

> ✅ **Confirmed (2026-04-21):** On Hand and On Order labels and values are **plain display elements** (`<span>`, cursor: auto, no click handler). Neither the label nor the value is interactive — no tooltip, no drill-through link, no modal.
>
> ⚠️ **Missing — Drill-through from On Hand / On Order (FR-PR-017 🚧 Pending):** Values are display-only with no link to the inventory module or active PO list. BRD FR-PR-017 specifies: On Order should include a **tooltip showing expected delivery dates**; On Hand should be **colour-coded** (green/yellow/red) based on stock levels with a warning icon when on-hand is critical but on-order exists. None of these visual indicators or interactive behaviours are present in the live UI.

### Inventory Information Fields (per item)

| Field | Edit Permission | Description | Example |
|-------|-----------------|-------------|---------|
| On Hand | View Only | Current stock quantity at item's location | 0 KG |
| On Order | View Only | Quantity currently on active Purchase Orders | 5 KG |
| Re-order Pt. | View Only | Stock level that triggers reorder | 0 KG |
| Re-stock | View Only | Quantity needed to reach par level | 0 KG |
| Stock Level | View Only | Percentage of target stock held | 0.0% |

> **Note (FR-PR-016):** The current implementation shows inventory for the **item's assigned location only**. BRD FR-PR-016 specifies cross-location visibility (stock at other locations + inter-location transfer suggestions). Cross-location view and consumption analytics (30-day history, forecasting, price variance alerts) are not yet implemented.

> ⚠️ **Documentation Gap (FR-PR-016/017):** Integration mechanics are not yet documented: BRD specifies a dedicated inventory API endpoint with a **5-minute cache TTL**, **async loading** (skeleton/spinner while data fetches), and explicit **error states** (e.g., "Inventory unavailable — data may be stale" when the service is unreachable). The current docs confirm what fields are displayed but do not capture the endpoint path, cache strategy, loading UX, or fallback behaviour. Priority: High.

### Vendor Fields in Expanded Item (Approver — read-only)

| Field | Edit Permission | Remark |
|-------|-----------------|--------|
| Vendor | View Only | Select Vendor button visible but **disabled** for Approver |
| Unit Price | View Only | Pricelist rate shown if set |
| Tax Profile | View Only | None / VAT 10% / Vat 7% |
| Tax % / Tax Amt | View Only | Calculated from profile |
| Disc % / Disc Amt | View Only | Applied discount |
| Subtotal / Net / Total | View Only | Per-item financial summary |

![Expanded Item — Inventory Information (HOD read-only view)](data:image/png;base64,)


---

## 22. Status Transitions (FR-PR-006)

The Approver's actions drive PR status changes. The outcome depends on whether the current stage is the **final** approval stage or an intermediate one.

### Status Transition Rules

| Approver Action | Stage Type | Status Before | Status After | Notes |
|-----------------|------------|--------------|--------------|-------|
| Save (Approved Qty set) | Intermediate | IN PROGRESS | IN PROGRESS | Routes to next approver stage |
| Save (Approved Qty set) | Final | IN PROGRESS | APPROVED | All stages complete; ready for PO conversion |
| Reject (BRD) | Any | IN PROGRESS | VOID | PR permanently denied; returned to requestor with mandatory comment |
| Return (BRD) | Any | IN PROGRESS | IN PROGRESS | Returned to selected previous stage; requestor or prior stage notified |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** BRD FR-PR-006 defines VOID as the status after Reject and specifies the IN PROGRESS → APPROVED transition only occurs at final stage. In the live UI, Reject and Return buttons are absent (see §8). The status after Save has not been observed transitioning to APPROVED — only "status remains IN PROGRESS" was confirmed in testing. The final-stage → APPROVED transition is documented per BRD specification but marked TBC for live confirmation.

### Status Colour Coding (FR-PR-006)

| Status | Colour | Meaning for Approver |
|--------|--------|----------------------|
| IN PROGRESS | Yellow | PR is awaiting action at one or more stages |
| APPROVED | Green | All approval stages complete |
| VOID | Red | PR was rejected; requestor must revise and resubmit |
| DRAFT | Gray | Not yet submitted (Approver will not normally see these) |
| COMPLETED | Blue | Converted to PO; read-only |

---

## 23. Budget Commitment Rules (FR-PR-004)

The Approver's actions affect budget commitments. FR-PR-004 is marked 🚧 Pending in BRD v1.9.0 but the commitment model applies to the Approver workflow.

| Event | Commitment Effect |
|-------|------------------|
| PR Submitted (by Requestor) | Soft commitment created — budget reserved but not yet hard-locked |
| Approver approves (intermediate stage) | Soft commitment remains; PR advances to next stage |
| Approver approves (final stage → APPROVED) | Soft commitment converts to **hard commitment** (budget locked until PO created) |
| Approver rejects (PR → VOID) | Commitment **released within 1 hour** — budget returned to available balance |
| Approver returns PR | Commitment remains as soft; PR reverts to earlier stage |

### Budget Panel (read-only for Approver)

The PR Detail shows a Budget Information panel (visible to all roles per FR-PR-027):

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| Budget Category | Cost centre / category for this PR |
| Budget Allocated | Total budget for the category |
| Budget Committed | Amount already committed (soft + hard) |
| Budget Available | Allocated − Committed |
| Budget Impact | This PR's contribution to commitment |

> **Note:** The Budget Tab was not observed in the live HOD UI (see §16). The commitment model above is per BRD specification; live behaviour TBC.

> ⚠️ **Documentation Gap (FR-PR-004):** The commitment lifecycle table above covers the high-level state transitions, but BRD FR-PR-004 specifies additional rules not yet documented: (a) exact timing of soft commitment creation (on submit vs. on save as Draft), (b) partial-approval commitment behaviour when one approver rejects a subset of items, (c) commitment release SLA (1-hour window confirmed for Reject; not confirmed for Return), and (d) approval-stage constraints on editing committed amounts. Priority: High.

---

## 24. Auto-Pricing View (FR-PR-028)

BRD FR-PR-028 specifies that Approvers have read-only access to the price comparison table and MOQ alerts. **Confirmed NOT present in the live UI (2026-04-21).**

**Purchaser context:** The Purchaser's edit mode has a `aria-label="Pricelist"` icon button next to each item's vendor row (visible in expanded item card). Clicking it opens a **"Price List Comparison"** modal with columns: Vendor | Pricelist No | Unit | Price | Currency | Effective. This modal is entirely absent from the Approver role — the icon does not appear in HOD read-only view, HOD edit mode, or any other approver role.

**Icon position:** The Pricelist button is at the **far right of the scrollable item row** (items grid has horizontal overflow; the icon only appears after scrolling right ~138px). It sits at the rightmost end of the expanded item card, after the Pricelist display field.

### BRD-Specified Approver Access (FR-PR-028)

| Feature | BRD Spec | Live UI (Confirmed) |
|---------|----------|---------------------|
| View Price Comparison Table ("Pricelist" icon → modal) | 👁️ Read-only | ❌ Not present — icon absent from Approver view |
| View MOQ Alerts | ✅ Yes | ❌ Not present |
| Select Vendor | ❌ Not permitted | ❌ Not permitted |
| Override Recommended Vendor | ❌ Not permitted | ❌ Not permitted |

### What Is Visible in the Expanded Item Card

The expanded item card shows vendor and pricing fields in **read-only** form (input controls visible but disabled for Approver):

| Field | Live Status | Notes |
|-------|-------------|-------|
| Vendor | Visible — "Select Vendor" dropdown | Disabled for Approver |
| Unit Price | Visible | Read-only numeric field |
| Pricelist | Visible | Shows "—" if no pricelist assigned |
| Tax Profile | Visible | Dropdown (read-only) |
| Tax % / Tax Amt / Override | Visible | Calculated fields |
| Disc % / Disc Amt / Override | Visible | Applied discount |
| Subtotal / Net / Total | Visible | Per-item financial summary |

No price comparison table, vendor scoring, MOQ alerts, or "Recommended" vendor indicator are shown for the Approver role in the current implementation.

**Purchaser "Pricelist" modal (for reference — this icon is absent in Approver view):**

**Purchaser "Pricelist" button position (scrolled right — icon at far right of item row):**

![Pricelist icon button visible after scrolling right in Purchaser edit mode](data:image/png;base64,)

**"Price List Comparison" modal (Purchaser only — absent in Approver view):**

![Price List Comparison modal — Vendor | Pricelist No | Unit | Price | Currency | Effective](data:image/png;base64,)

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (2026-04-21):** FR-PR-028 is marked ✅ Implemented in BRD v1.9.0 for Purchasing Staff. **Confirmed present** for Purchaser: a "Pricelist" icon button opens a "Price List Comparison" modal in edit mode. The same feature is **absent for all Approver roles** — the icon button does not appear in HOD/FC/GM/Owner read-only or edit mode views. The Approver "👁️ View-only" access to price comparison specified in BRD FR-PR-028 is not implemented.

---

## 25. Print and Export (FR-PR-013)

BRD FR-PR-013 is marked 🔧 Partial. The following capabilities apply to the Approver role:

| Feature | Availability | Notes |
|---------|-------------|-------|
| Print PR Detail | Partial | Print Preview + PDF generation expected |
| Export PR to Excel | Partial | Full item + header export for offline review |
| Batch Export (from List) | Partial | Export multiple PRs from step-02 list view |
| Email PR as PDF | Pending | Not confirmed in live UI |

> **Note:** Print/Export controls were not captured in Approver screenshots. Access is expected via a menu or button in the PR Detail header. Confirm button location and available formats with the development team.

> ⚠️ **Documentation Gap (FR-PR-013):** BRD FR-PR-013 (Partial) specifies detail not yet captured: the PDF template layout (header fields included, item column order, footer totals), Excel column mapping, whether export respects the user's current filter/sort, and whether batch export from the PR List produces one file per PR or a consolidated workbook. Priority: Medium.

---

## 26. Undocumented Features

The following BRD requirements affect this persona (Approver) but have not yet been captured in live UI documentation. They are either pending implementation or have not been observed in the current ZB01 test environment.

| FR | Title | Priority | BRD Status | Notes |
|----|-------|----------|------------|-------|
| FR-PR-012 | Copy & Template | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Ability to copy an existing PR or save as a reusable template — no live UI evidence observed |
| FR-PR-014 | Notifications | High | 🚧 Pending | Email templates, delivery timing, SLA (e.g. notify approver within X hrs of submission), and per-user preference configuration — not implemented in live UI |
| FR-PR-015 | Mobile Responsiveness | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Touch target sizing, mobile-optimised forms, and offline/low-connectivity behaviour — not verified on mobile viewports |
| FR-PR-019 | Price Visibility Controls | Medium | 🔧 Partial | "Hide Price" toggle and role-based price override — §19 documents Approver read-only view but does not capture the toggle mechanism or which roles can override visibility |
| FR-PR-021 | Item Metadata Enhancement | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Required Date per line item and Delivery Point free-text comments — fields not observed in Approver view |
| FR-PR-022 | Delivery Point Dropdown | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Master data filtering by property/location and typeahead validation — not documented; Delivery Point field behaviour in Approver view is TBC |
| FR-PR-023 | Header Total Removal | Low | 🚧 Pending | Role-based suppression of the PR header total for Requestor role — not applicable to Approver but affects total visibility across the workflow |
| FR-PR-025 | Monetary Formatting | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Locale-aware number formatting (thousand separators, decimal places) and auto-format on numeric input — formatting behaviour in Approver read-only view not explicitly documented |
